visual_description: In a dimly lit office, a man in a light blue button-down shirt sits at a desk, holding a white paper cup. He takes a sip from the cup, then looks down at a piece of paper he is holding. Another man in a white shirt is visible in the background, looking at a computer screen.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in Mandarin, followed by a loud, sustained electronic tone.
